description: Case style: Stainless steel rectangular case Dial style: White dial with silver and white coloured hands Strap style: Steel strap with butterfly claspFeatures: Branding on the 12 and 6 hour mark, a screw to reset time and date aperture at the 6 hour mark Waterproof to 3 ATM, wearable around sinks and in mild rains Warranty: 1 year
